title: tillaea bolanderi
intro: Tillaea bolanderi, also known as Bolander's tillaea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Tilliaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, to treat various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The plant is known to have health benefits including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. Tillaea bolanderi can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular choice among herbalists for its versatility in treatment and prevention of various health ailments.
